headline: Humana (NYSE:HUM) Reports Q1 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
summary: Health insurance company Humana (NYSE:HUM) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 23.5% year on year to $39.65 billion. Its GAAP profit of $9.83 per share was 8.6% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

content.title: Humana (NYSE:HUM) Reports Q1 CY2026 In Line With Expectations
content.summary: Health insurance company Humana (NYSE:HUM) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 23.5% year on year to $39.65 billion. Its GAAP profit of $9.83 per share was 8.6% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Profit recovery is ‘priority No. 1,’ Humana promises
summary: Humana’s foremost priority is returning to 3% Medicare Advantage margins in 2028, CEO Jim Rechtin repeatedly promised investors on Wednesday morning. Still, the insurer’s profits dipped in the first quarter.

content.title: Profit recovery is ‘priority No. 1,’ Humana promises
content.summary: Humana’s foremost priority is returning to 3% Medicare Advantage margins in 2028, CEO Jim Rechtin repeatedly promised investors on Wednesday morning. Still, the insurer’s profits dipped in the first quarter.
